ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (H for home, A for away) */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opp_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the team after the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "is_conference_game" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is a conference game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the opponent's home stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the opponent's coach */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the opponent was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the opponent */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the opponent's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season was played */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opp_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter */,
  "player_stats" TEXT /* Detailed player statistics for the game */,
  "team_fouls" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed by the team */,
  "team_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total number of turnovers by the team */,
  "team_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists by the team */,
  "team_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
